Description: Lilithport changes forward+back to be treated as back. Alters client-side fixes.
Additional Details: Usually fixes Walk-Block related issues in 2DFM, but means that there's not parity between online/offline experience.

Description: You can get hit when grabbing a player facing away from you, if that player has a hitbox active that would hit the opponent after turning around.
Additional Details: In 2DFM, players are turned to face the opponent immediately when grabbed. This normally doesn't cause issues, but on LilithPort, the player's invulnerability updates a frame later. This makes active hitboxes hit the grab user when playing online.
